title: Enhanced Visuals
description: Resource pack That Aims for the best Visibility. Beautiful Views and overall a easier PvP Experience.
body:
Welcome to Enhanced Visuals
------------------------------------------------------
Join our discord for updates and changes!
https://discord.gg/F2dJXyWhWR

The Resource Pack features Alot of new things!

-Clear Water!

Having trouble seeing what's under water from above the surface? Not a Problem anymore!
Clear Water

-Easier PvP Experience!

Bigger crosshair, Bigger cooldown, Custom enchant glint and Low fire.



-Better Visuals!

Being bored with the Old GUI and UI? Well say no more! Now with the more transparent Inventory and easier Hotbar will be a Different experience!



-Re-Textured Blocks!

Felt bored looking at those common blocks that feel smooth and aren't that hard? Featuring new blocks that Might look better than before! Even tho majority of them are missing..
